headline: Is Trane (TT) Turning Technician Training Into Its Next Competitive Moat In Commercial HVAC?
summary: Earlier this month, Trane Technologies opened its 45,000-square-foot Advanced Technology Training Center at its Davidson, North Carolina headquarters, aiming to train up to 4,500 commercial HVAC technicians annually through hybrid, hands-on programs. This large-scale workforce investment, alongside recent multi-year R&D spending on compressor and chiller labs, highlights how technician expertise is becoming a core competitive asset in increasingly complex and sustainability-focused HVAC...
